title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that the AI agent industry has normalized unreliability, with most agents failing in practice because errors compound across multi-step workflows. He advocates for building agents that work reliably on the first try through rigorous testing practices and taste development, rather than pursuing raw performance metrics.
